description: Case diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 11 mmDial shape: RoundWarranty: 1yrSteel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortSteel strap with a butterfly clasp for comfort and styleBlue coloured dial with brand logo at the 12 hour mark, date and day display at the 3 hour mark and the branding  at the 9 hour markScrew to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 50 meters allowing you to use it when washing your hands, in light rain etc.
